pi_items.source: Code analysis of export_result.sh which explicitly hardcodes checks for the 'Important' folder, and setup_task.sh which explicitly removes any pre-existing 'Important' folder.
Task description explicitly instructs the user to move at least 3 emails. verifier.py defaults to 3 if missing and uses this value to score the trajectory.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a folder explicitly named 'Important' (verified via hardcoded checks in export_result.sh) and moving at least 3 emails into it (verified via task description and verifier.py logic). The email data originates from the real SpamAssassin public corpus.
